overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk through Night City's dense urban downtown. The player navigates covered walkways, open intersections, and narrow neon-lit alleys while observing traffic and pedestrians in a futuristic cyberpunk environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway beneath elevated highway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along covered sidewalk beneath the elevated highway structure, passing by industrial buildings

notable_agents.action: woman in colorful pink and blue outfit walking past the camera

entered.detail: tall green industrial structure with circular windows and metallic facade
orange metal safety barriers separating sidewalk from the road below
massive concrete and steel elevated highway structure overhead
pink neon sign with the text TEN visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a covered walkway beneath Night City's elevated highway system. The player moves forward along a concrete sidewalk bordered by orange safety railings on the right and a massive green industrial building on the left. Sparse pedestrians walk in the opposite direction as artificial lighting illuminates the enclosed space.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition area with construction barriers approaching intersection

events.description: exiting the covered walkway into a more open area with visible sky and approaching intersection

agents.ego_description: continuing forward past construction barriers and trash bags toward the open intersection

entered.detail: yellow and black striped construction barriers blocking off part of the walkway
pile of garbage bags and debris on the sidewalk near the railing
large yellow electrical utility box with warning markings

segments.scene_description: The player emerges from the covered walkway into a transitional semi-open area. Construction barriers and trash bags line the path as the environment opens up to reveal the night sky. The space feels industrial and slightly neglected, with mixed lighting from overhead fixtures and distant neon.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection with elevated highway ramp and corporate signage

events.description: turning right to view the elevated highway ramp and surrounding skyscrapers
vehicles passing by on the street below the overpass

agents.ego_description: turning to observe the elevated highway architecture and dense urban skyline while walking along the street edge

entered.detail: curved elevated highway ramp with vehicles traveling along it
large green and red neon sign reading FOODSCAPE on building facade
massive futuristic skyscrapers with illuminated windows towering above
large illuminated digital advertisements on building walls
massive orange structural column supporting the highway above

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide urban intersection dominated by an elevated highway ramp. The player turns right to take in the view of towering skyscrapers and massive digital billboards. Moderate traffic flows along the roads while the FOODSCAPE neon sign glows prominently on the left. The atmosphere is distinctly cyberpunk with mixed artificial lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow alley with hanging red lanterns and vending machines

events.description: turning left into narrow alleyway decorated with red paper lanterns and steam vents

agents.ego_description: turning into a narrow alleyway lined with vending machines and illuminated by red lanterns, navigating through pedestrians

entered.detail: strings of traditional red paper lanterns hanging across the alleyway
row of illuminated vending machines with advertisements and product displays
steam rising from vents in the ground creating atmospheric effect

segments.scene_description: The player turns left into a narrow, atmospheric alleyway straight out of a traditional Asian street market but set in the cyberpunk future. Red paper lanterns hang overhead while vending machines line the left wall. Steam rises from floor vents, and the density of pedestrians increases as the camera moves through the enclosed space.

scene_state.functional_zone: street intersection with crosswalk and active traffic

events.description: waiting at crosswalk as multiple vehicles pass by
large truck drives through the intersection

agents.ego_description: approaching crosswalk and waiting for traffic to clear before crossing the street

notable_agents.action: white and blue truck driving through the intersection

entered.detail: white painted crosswalk lines on the asphalt road
tall pole with traffic signals and street lighting
street sign reading Cartwright mounted on the traffic pole

segments.scene_description: Exiting the narrow alley, the player emerges onto a wider street at a crosswalk. The scene features active vehicle traffic with cars and trucks passing by. The player waits at the crosswalk marked by white stripes, positioned near a traffic light pole with a Cartwright street sign, as the video concludes with a truck passing through the intersection.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a claustrophobic industrial underpass into a semi-open urban transitional space. It begins on a covered walkway beneath an elevated highway, moving along a concrete sidewalk flanked by orange safety railings and a massive green industrial building. As the camera advances past sparse pedestrians, the enclosed environment gradually gives way to a more open area. The scene then shifts into a neglected industrial zone where construction barriers and trash bags line the path, allowing the artificial overhead lighting to blend with the reveal of the dark night sky.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide, towering urban intersection into a claustrophobic neon alleyway before emerging back into the flow of city traffic. It begins at a sprawling junction dominated by an elevated highway ramp and massive digital billboards, where the camera pans right to take in the skyscrapers and the glow of a Foodscape sign. As the perspective shifts, the camera turns left to enter a narrow, atmospheric alleyway filled with red paper lanterns, vending machines, and rising steam. The scene then opens up as the camera exits the enclosed market space and arrives at a wide crosswalk marked by white stripes and a Cartwright street sign. Finally, the movement settles at the intersection as the camera observes active vehicle traffic, concluding with a truck passing through the frame.
